hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */docs/*|*/tests/*|*__tests__*|*.test.*|*.spec.*|*.md) ;; */apps/api/*|*/apps/web/*|*/packages/shared/*|*/docker/*|*docker-compose*|*render.yaml|*turbo.json|*/scripts/*|*.env.example) printf '%s\n' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Docs Sync rule (CLAUDE.md): this edit touched source described in docs/codebase/. Before finishing the task, update the matching reference note per the mapping table (e.g. schema.prisma -> Database Schema.md, API routes -> API Routes Reference.md). Skip only if the change is test-only or a purely internal refactor."}}' ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
